title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0467
summary: The petitioner Rahul alleged that his estranged wife (respondent no.2) and her relative (respondent no.3) forcibly stopped a bus, assaulted his mother, stole ₹15,000, and kidnapped his son. The wife had previously handed over custody of the child to Rahul via an attested statement.
